key_facts: Founded 2022 by Xu Yingtong (23 years at Huawei, led Huawei's PV business and Ascend AI chip) and Zhang Xianmao (11 years at Huawei, led PV inverter division)
Pure-play tech-entrepreneur spinout — no parent conglomerate
Within one month of founding: raised seed round
By end-2022: Series A1-A3 totaling ~CNY 540M (Hillhouse Capital, Walden International, Yunhui Capital)
Listed on HKEX (6656.HK) April 2026, raising HK$4.4B with 1,000x oversubscription
Revenue 2025: approximately RMB 9B (based on trajectory — verify)
Product: SigenStor all-in-one stackable distributed energy storage + solar system for residential/C&I
#1 globally in stackable all-in-one DESS (Distributed Energy Storage System) with 24% market share
Competes directly with Tesla Powerwall, Enphase IQ Battery, Sungrow SH-series

funding_history.notes: Raised within 1 month of founding — investor confidence in Huawei pedigree of founding team
CNY 540M total in rapid succession through 2022
1,000x oversubscribed; landmark exit for Chinese cleantech startup; validated ex-Huawei founder model

business_model_notes: Hardware-first DESS with integrated software: SigenStor all-in-one unit (PV optimizer + battery + inverter + EMS in one box) makes solar+storage installation plug-and-play for residential/C&I. Revenue: hardware sale margin (high ASP due to integrated design) + SigenOS cloud management subscription. Competitive moat: (1) ex-Huawei team = AI/software capability; (2) stackable modular design (3.6 kWh base unit, stack to 100+ kWh) enables residential to C&I in same product line; (3) 24% global stackable DESS share = network effect in installer trust.
competitive_position: Disrupted incumbent BESS players (Sungrow, BYD, CATL) with AI-native, stackable, all-in-one approach from standing start in 2022. 22.8x revenue growth in 2024 shows China's fastest cleantech growth trajectory. IPO demonstrates HKEX appetite for AI-enabled energy storage plays. Main threat: Sungrow and BYD volume pricing; Enphase in US/European residential markets.
research_notes: Highest confidence (★5). HKEX prospectus filed publicly. Revenue figures from SCMP, Bamboo Works, AsiaBits. Funding rounds confirmed via multiple investor sources. Xu Yingtong and Zhang Xianmao backgrounds verified through HKEX prospectus disclosure. 24% global DESS market share from Bamboo Works citing market research. This is the standout growth story of the 2020s in China downstream solar.
